mapper.select:
select id, name, sort, status, create_time, update_time from category
and name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
order by sort asc, create_time desc
mapper.update:
update category
name = #{name},
sort = #{sort},
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, sort, status from category where status = 1 order by sort asc, create_time desc
